entries.description: Catch some early morning waves at Surfers Paradise Beach, just a short drive from campus. Perfect way to kickstart the day!
entries.photo_prompt: sunrise surfing at Surfers Paradise Beach, vibrant waves, golden light, energetic students

entries.description: Grab an avo toast and flat white at G's Cafe on campus. It's a student favourite and a great spot to meet up with friends.
entries.photo_prompt: students enjoying breakfast at G's Cafe, avocado toast, coffee cups, friendly atmosphere, campus vibes

entries.description: Dive into a hands-on marine science lab at Griffith’s Advanced Design and Prototyping Technologies Institute. Investigate local marine life and ecosystems.
entries.photo_prompt: students in a marine science lab, examining aquatic specimens, modern equipment, focused learning

entries.description: Hit up the Nathan campus library for a study sesh. The quiet floors are perfect for cramming or group projects.
entries.photo_prompt: students studying in Griffith University library, books, laptops, collaborative atmosphere, modern interior

entries.description: Squeeze in a workout at the uni’s fitness centre. It’s got top-notch equipment, perfect for blowing off steam between classes.
entries.photo_prompt: students working out at Griffith University gym, fitness equipment, energetic mood, diverse students

entries.description: Head to Market Square in Varsity Lakes for some Asian street food. It's a popular spot for students to unwind and fuel up.
entries.photo_prompt: students dining at Market Square, vibrant food stalls, diverse dishes, lively evening atmosphere

entries.description: Stroll down Burleigh Heads Beach, enjoying the stunning sunset views. It's a relaxing way to end a busy uni day.
entries.photo_prompt: students walking on Burleigh Heads Beach at sunset, colourful sky, peaceful ocean, serene students

entries.description: Start the day with a refreshing jog around Princes Park, just a stone's throw from campus. Breathe in the crisp morning air.
entries.photo_prompt: A student jogging at sunrise through Princes Park, surrounded by green trees and morning mist

entries.description: Fuel up with a flat white and avo toast at Seven Seeds, a popular student café tucked away in Carlton.
entries.photo_prompt: A bustling café interior, with students sipping coffee and eating breakfast, sunlight streaming through large windows

entries.description: Head to a thought-provoking Arts lecture in the historic Old Arts Building, a true testament to the university's rich history.
entries.photo_prompt: A historic university lecture hall, filled with attentive students and an engaging lecturer

entries.description: Enjoy a variety of lunch options at Union House. Today, it's all about the dumplings from the food court.
entries.photo_prompt: A lively food court in Union House, students chatting and eating diverse meals at communal tables

entries.activity: Study session in the Baillieu Library
entries.description: Crack down on some assignments at the Baillieu Library, surrounded by an inspiring collection of books and resources.
entries.photo_prompt: A student studying intently in a library, books and laptops on the table, shelves filled with books in the background

entries.activity: Catch the tram to St Kilda
entries.description: Hop on the iconic Melbourne tram for a quick ride to St Kilda Beach. Perfect way to unwind after a busy day.
entries.photo_prompt: A colourful Melbourne tram traveling through the city, with students inside enjoying the ride and cityscapes

entries.description: Enjoy a pay-as-you-feel dinner at Lentil As Anything in Abbotsford. Great food for a great cause with friends.
entries.photo_prompt: A warm, inviting restaurant with communal tables, diverse dishes being served, and happy diners sharing meals

entries.description: Start the day with a refreshing jog along The Strand, enjoying the ocean breeze and stunning sunrise over Magnetic Island.
entries.photo_prompt: Joggers on The Strand beach at sunrise, ocean view, Magnetic Island in background, palm trees swaying

entries.activity: Lecture at Eddie Koiki Mabo Library
entries.description: Head to the Eddie Koiki Mabo Library for a Marine Biology lecture, taking notes in the light-filled study spaces.
entries.photo_prompt: Students taking notes in Eddie Koiki Mabo Library, bright interior, bookshelves, laptops open, tropical plants indoors

entries.description: Grab a flat white and catch up with mates at Juliette's on Flinders Street, a favourite student hangout.
entries.photo_prompt: Friends chatting at Juliette's cafe, Flinders Street, busy urban setting, coffee cups, laughter

entries.description: Join a research trip to the Great Barrier Reef, marvelling at the vibrant corals and diverse marine life.
entries.photo_prompt: Students snorkeling in Great Barrier Reef, colourful corals, tropical fish, crystal clear water, underwater research

entries.description: Discuss environmental science projects with classmates on the grassy Campus Green, surrounded by tropical flora and fauna.
entries.photo_prompt: Students sitting on Campus Green, notebooks and laptops, tropical plants and trees, relaxed atmosphere

entries.description: Enjoy a seafood dinner at The Watermark, sharing stories from the day while overlooking the marina's twinkling lights.
entries.photo_prompt: Seafood dinner at The Watermark, waterfront view, marina lights, friends laughing, elegant presentation

entries.description: Drive up to Castle Hill for an evening of stargazing, spotting constellations in the clear tropical night sky.
entries.photo_prompt: Group stargazing at Castle Hill, vast night sky, visible constellations, Townsville lights below, sense of wonder

entries.description: Start the day paddling on the Brisbane River with the UQ Kayak Club, enjoying stunning views of the St Lucia campus.
entries.photo_prompt: Students kayaking at sunrise, Brisbane River, lush greenery, St Lucia campus in background, vibrant sky

entries.description: Grab a flat white from Merlo Coffee inside the Duhig Building to kickstart your brain for the day ahead.
entries.photo_prompt: Barista pouring a flat white at Merlo Coffee, cozy cafe atmosphere, students chatting, books on tables

entries.description: Engage in an interactive lecture at the state-of-the-art GCI building, learning about renewable energy systems.
entries.photo_prompt: UQ GCI building, students in lecture hall, professor explaining, renewable energy diagrams on screen

entries.description: Enjoy a healthy poke bowl from Playa Bowls at the St. Lucia Village, a popular hangout spot for UQ students.
entries.photo_prompt: Colourful poke bowl, fresh ingredients, students sitting outside Playa Bowls, vibrant atmosphere

entries.description: Find a spot under the shade of the Great Court's iconic sandstone arches to review notes for upcoming exams.
entries.photo_prompt: UQ Great Court, students studying under sandstone arches, green lawns, sunlit scene

entries.description: Join the Environmental Management Society for a chill catch-up and some wildlife spotting around UQ Lakes.
entries.photo_prompt: UQ Lakes at sunset, students gathered, wildlife in view, relaxed and social atmosphere

entries.description: Catch the CityCat to The Regatta Hotel for a classic Aussie pub dinner with mates overlooking the river.
entries.photo_prompt: The Regatta Hotel, lively dinner scene, friends laughing, Brisbane River view, warm lighting

entries.description: Catch some waves at Bondi Beach before classes. It's an energising way to start the day and popular among students.
entries.photo_prompt: student surfing at sunrise, Bondi Beach waves, golden sunlight, surfers in background, vibrant ocean

entries.description: Grab a flat white at Penny Lane on campus. It's the go-to spot for a quick caffeine fix before lectures.
entries.photo_prompt: students at Penny Lane cafe, holding coffee cups, UNSW campus, modern interior, morning sunlight through windows

entries.description: Head to Clancy Auditorium for a stimulating guest lecture in AI. It's an opportunity to learn from industry leaders.
entries.photo_prompt: students in Clancy Auditorium, listening to lecturer, dynamic presentation slide, attentive audience

entries.description: Chill out with friends over burgers and chips at The White House. It's the best spot for a hearty lunch on campus.
entries.photo_prompt: students eating at The White House, casual setting, burgers and fries, outdoor seating, laughter

entries.description: Hit up UNSW Library for some quiet study. The views from the upper floors are perfect for a productive afternoon.
entries.photo_prompt: students studying in UNSW Library, books and laptops, panoramic window view, focused atmosphere

entries.description: Unwind with a jog around Centennial Park. The lush greenery and open spaces offer a refreshing escape from studies.
entries.photo_prompt: student jogging in Centennial Park, sunset hues, tree-lined pathways, serene natural setting

entries.description: Venture to Newtown for some tasty Thai food with mates. King Street is buzzing with life and flavours from all over.
entries.photo_prompt: students dining in Newtown, vibrant street atmosphere, Thai restaurant, bustling evening, diverse crowd
